profile.name: Lam Nguyen
profile.title: Mobile Security & Privacy · Android App Analysis · Agentic AI Systems
profile.affiliation: Ph.D. in Computer Science, University of Insubria · Open to AI Security, Mobile Security, and Agentic AI opportunities
profile.summary: I hold a Ph.D. in Computer Science with a specialization in Security and Privacy. I build evidence-grounded systems for mobile and wearable privacy, Android app analysis, and agentic AI, combining static/dynamic analysis, taint analysis, network traffic inspection, RAG/GraphRAG, and LLM-based reasoning.
profile.about: I am a computer scientist specializing in mobile security and privacy, Android app analysis, privacy compliance, and agentic AI. My work focuses on building end-to-end systems that detect, explain, and mitigate privacy violations in mobile and wearable ecosystems. I have designed research systems such as MetaLeak, ALIBIS, WearLeak, WearPri, PrivacyAssist, EBPS, and RootFlow, and I also bring production engineering experience in backend systems, Kubernetes, API gateways, CI/CD, and automation.
profile.role: AI Security & Privacy Engineer · Mobile Security Researcher · Agentic AI Systems

research.title: Mobile privacy auditing
research.description: Automated systems that combine app evidence, disclosures, dynamic traffic, and LLM reasoning to detect data-practice inconsistencies.

research.title: Wearable app compliance
research.description: Frameworks for estimating non-compliance and responsibility in wearable companion apps using taint analysis, RAG, and GraphRAG.

research.title: Agentic AI for Android
research.description: Root-anchored mobile app exploration that discovers feature flows and synthesizes executable goals for mobile agents.

research.title: Evidence-based policy synthesis
research.description: Fine-grained, context-aware access-control policies derived from multi-source evidence and optimized for privacy and usability.

research.title: Metadata leakage detection
research.description: Hybrid and source-code analysis pipelines for detecting sensitive EXIF metadata leakage in mobile image-sharing apps.

research.title: Production-ready research systems
research.description: Cloud-native engineering experience in Kubernetes, API gateways, CI/CD, DevOps automation, and backend systems.

projects.name: WearPri
projects.description: Pre-release privacy auditing framework for Android wearable companion apps, estimating data-sharing non-compliance and attributing responsibility to app developers or third-party services.

projects.name: EBPS
projects.description: Evidence-Based Policy Synthesis for Android, deriving fine-grained privacy-policy candidates from multi-source app evidence and LLM-driven reasoning.

projects.name: RootFlow
projects.description: Root-anchored mobile app exploration framework that builds feature-flow graphs and synthesizes executable goals for LLM-based mobile agents.

projects.name: MetaLeak
projects.description: Hybrid-analysis framework detecting sensitive EXIF image metadata leakage in Android apps through static permission analysis and dynamic network inspection.

projects.name: ALIBIS
projects.description: Automated source-code risk estimation system for sensitive metadata leakage, combining static analysis, code-block extraction, RAG, and LLM summarization.

projects.name: PrivacyAssist
projects.description: User-centric multi-agent privacy assistant that detects inconsistencies between user-granted permissions and declared data practices during app installation.

experience.role: Postdoctoral Researcher — Agentic AI for Mobile Security and Privacy
experience.description: Led and developed WearPri, EBPS, and RootFlow: systems for wearable privacy auditing, evidence-based policy synthesis, and root-anchored mobile app exploration for agentic AI. This role is listed as a completed appointment to keep the website ready for the next position.

experience.role: Ph.D. Candidate — Mobile and Wearable App Security/Privacy
experience.description: Designed MetaLeak, ALIBIS, WearLeak, and PrivacyAssist for privacy compliance, metadata leakage detection, and user-centric protection.
Automated Kong API Gateway infrastructure, CI/CD, Kubernetes deployments, GitOps workflows, zero-downtime canary releases, and disaster recovery.
Designed backend APIs and production platforms including SSO, conferencing, GIS, storage, and messaging services using Go, Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins.

education.description: Security and Privacy. Thesis: Security and Privacy Analysis of Mobile and Wearable Applications.

education.degree: Master of Engineering in Telecommunications Engineering
education.school: University of Technology — Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City
education.description: Thesis: Elliptic Curve Cryptography algorithm and application to build a Smart-Auto Parking system.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical-Electronics Engineering
education.school: University of Technology — Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City
education.description: Honors Program, Electronics-Telecommunications. Thesis: Integrated smart parking and RFID-based access-control system.
